title: 05637_DistiLLM-2_A_Contrastive_Approach_Boosts_the_Distillation_of_LLMs
positive_examples: High-performed reference model for RLHF can contribute to building safe AI.
DISTILLM-2 can enhance the performance of quantized LLMs, making them competitive with original models.
Improves inference speed of LLMs, benefiting systems that utilize diverse models.
